Interface IWorkspaceExtension3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply workspace extension information.

[Guid("5353322D-0CF1-4963-84D4-DAD544AC5A0C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IWorkspaceExtension3 : IWorkspaceExtension2, IWorkspaceExtension
